title: Line Charts for Time Series in Datilio
summary: Line charts in Datilio show trends when date columns parse correctly and filters define scope.

content.summary: Line charts in Datilio show trends when date columns parse correctly and filters define scope.

body.text: Trend stories drive staffing, inventory, and spend decisions. Confirm date type in preview. Apply date-range filter matching fiscal calendar. Choose daily or weekly grain consistent with export frequency.

items: Exclude partial current period when comparing growth.

body.text: Note seasonality and one-off events in slide notes—not every dip is catastrophe.
